project_name: Gravity Aranya
location: Banashankari 6th Stage, RR Nagar, Mysore Road, Kengeri, Kanakapura Road, Bangalore South
project_type: Eco-luxury forest-view villaments
unit_types: 3 BHK Duplex, 4 BHK Triplex
pricing: ₹2.8 Cr onwards
rera_status: Approved
rera_numbers: PRM/KA/RERA/1251/310/PR/080922/005224, ACK/KA/RERA/1251/310/PR/310823/007407

brand_tone: Aspirational, nature-centric
audience_profile: Luxury seekers, wellness families
trust_signals: RERA approved, Gated community, 250+ trees, Private gardens, 1-acre courtyard
